EDUCATIONAL: Field of study declared by the student at program enrollment.
Grade point average computed from course marks on a four-point scale.
Academic year of study completed by the student as of the census date.
Major degree program name from the official university catalog.
Department code associated with the student's primary area of concentration.
Subfield specialization within a broad discipline for doctoral candidates.
Double major combination string of two official field codes.
Minor field of study chosen alongside the primary degree program.
CIP code classification for the academic program per federal taxonomy.
Honors program affiliation within the declared major field.
Interdisciplinary program flag for degrees spanning multiple departments.
Faculty of enrollment for a student's primary academic discipline.
Concentration track within a major, like data science or literature.
Academic division of the university where the degree is housed.
Primary field of study at time of bachelor's degree conferral.
Degree level associated with the field: associate, bachelor, master, doctorate.
STEM designation indicator based on the field classification code.
Online program flag for the declared degree course delivery mode.
Accreditation body recognition status of the academic program.
Thesis track selection within a research-oriented master's field.
Certificate program name for a stand-alone academic credential.
Joint degree program partner institution identifier code.
Academic field change history count for a student's enrollment record.
Secondary major code for dual degree program participants.
Field of study for prior postsecondary credential from transfer records.
Enrolled college within a university system for the chosen academic field.
Field of study code mapped from free-text self-report data.
Cumulative grade point average across all attempted credit hours.
Term GPA for the most recent completed semester.
Major-specific GPA computed only from courses in the declared field.
Upper-division GPA for courses at the three-hundred level and above.
Science GPA from biology, chemistry, physics, and mathematics courses.
Adjusted GPA after academic renewal policy applied to repeated courses.
Weighted grade point average with honors course bonus points.
Core curriculum GPA from general education requirement courses only.
Graduate program GPA from master's or doctoral level coursework.
Last sixty credit hour GPA for graduate school admission evaluation.
Transcript GPA from all prior institutions attended by the student.
Standardized test score percentile rank in the national comparison group.
Class rank position among students in the same graduation cohort.
Academic probation status based on cumulative GPA below threshold.
Dean's list eligibility flag from term GPA above three point five.
Grade distribution summary with count of A, B, C, D, F earned.
Pass fail course count within the student's total academic record.
Quality points total sum product of credit hours and grade points.
Midterm grade point estimate for in-progress courses at week eight.
Grade point deficit to reach a target cumulative GPA for graduation.
Earned credit ratio from attempted versus completed credit hours.
Incomplete grade count on the transcript for the current academic term.
Withdrawal record count for courses dropped after the census date.
Retaken course flag for a class with a previous failing or low grade.
Academic performance trend slope computed from consecutive term GPAs.
Academic classification year: freshman, sophomore, junior, or senior designation.
Total credit hours earned toward the degree program of study.
Semester credit hour load for the current term enrollment.
Enrollment status category: full-time, part-time, or less than half-time.
Academic level code derived from the completed semester count.
Year of study within a professional degree program such as law.
Expected graduation term and year as of the academic plan.
Number of academic terms completed since the first matriculation date.
Academic standing code: good standing, warning, probation, dismissal.
Matriculation date of first enrollment in a degree-seeking program.
Cohort entry term identifier: fall, spring, or summer semester.
Time status since first enrollment measured in academic years elapsed.
Completed semester count toward the minimum residency requirement.
Satisfactory academic progress status for financial aid eligibility.
Academic term sequence number from one for the first semester.
Term type flag: regular fall, spring, or summer session.
Accumulated academic year equivalent from transferred credit hours.
Anticipated degree conferral date based on current course plan.
Semester code with year and term designation like 2025SP.
Calendar year of study start for the current degree program.
Enrollment gap period count where the student was not registered.
Leave of absence duration in academic terms from university record.
Re-entry term after an academic suspension period ends.
Year of program phase: didactic, clinical, or dissertation stage.
Degree conferral status from the registrar's graduation audit process.
Honors designation at graduation: cum laude, magna, summa.
Capstone project completion flag for the bachelor's degree requirement.
Comprehensive exam pass status for doctoral candidacy advancement.
Thesis defense outcome recorded as pass with revisions or fail.
Internship completion credit hours on the official transcript.
Study abroad program participation indicator with host institution code.
Senior thesis submission date for the undergraduate honors program.
Preliminary exam result for admission to doctoral candidacy.
Certificate of specialization award date for a concentration program.
Academic distinction award flag: President's or Dean's list honors.
Course prerequisite completion verification for a high-demand sequence.
Transfer articulation credit awarded for prior learning assessment.
Independent study course count on the student's academic history.
Research assistantship appointment term and department affiliation.
Thesis committee formation status for graduate degree progression.
Language proficiency requirement met flag for the arts and sciences.
Clinical rotation completion milestone for health professions programs.
Licensure exam first-attempt pass status for professional programs.
Capstone grade point average for the integrative final project sequence.
Dissertation manuscript submission date to the graduate school office.
Postdoctoral fellowship placement indicator from the graduate career office.
Undergraduate research symposium participation flag on the co-curricular record.
Dual credit enrollment in high school for college course completion.
